instruction: I still need the proposal email thread in the inbox handled today. Then review the Paris board and calendar; right now the board still lacks the next step, and if it clearly needs a live follow-up, add the sync, so add only what is missing, note it in a handoff file, and send alice@example.com a short update.

solution_commands: file create --path '/handoff/paris-proposal-followup.txt' --content 'Paris proposal follow-up handoff note.'
